logs.content: **Hello! 👋**, I'm **Agent Zero**, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?

logs.heading: A0: Loading Gmail skill to fetch threads

thoughts: The user wants me to load the 'gmail' skill using skills_tool:load and then follow its instructions to fetch Gmail threads.
The skill mentions it auto-detects days to look back and takes 5-15 minutes to complete.
I need to wait for completion and then use notify-user skill to send a success message.

thoughts: The Gmail skill has been loaded successfully. Now I need to execute the script as per its instructions.
The script is at /a0/usr/skills/gmail/scripts/gmail.py and will run for 5-15 minutes.
